dashboard.label: Today
dashboard.definition: {"title":"Today","description":"Daily health snapshot","defaults":{"dataSources":{"ds.search":{"options":{"queryParameters":{"latest":"$global_time.latest$","earliest":"$global_time.earliest$"}}}},"visualizations":{"global":{"showProgressBar":true}}},"inputs":{"input_global_trp":{"type":"input.timerange","options":{"token":"global_time","defaultValue":"-7d@d,now"},"title":"Time Range"}},"dataSources":{"ds_readiness":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"index=oura oura_data_type=readiness | dedup id | spath input=_raw path=\"contributors.hrv_balance\" output=hrv_bal | sort -_time | head 1 | eval hrv_bal=round(hrv_bal,0), temp_dev=round(temperature_deviation,2), tempcolor=case(abs(temp_dev)<=0.5,\"#4CAF50\",abs(temp_dev)<=1.0,\"#F4A422\",true(),\"#E8503A\") | table score, hrv_bal, temp_dev, tempcolor","queryParameters":{"earliest":"-2d","latest":"now"}},"name":"Readiness — latest (score/HRV/temp)"},"ds_sleep":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"index=oura oura_data_type=sleep | dedup id | sort -_time | head 1 | table score","queryParameters":{"earliest":"-2d","latest":"now"}},"name":"Sleep score — latest"},"ds_activity":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"index=oura oura_data_type=activity | dedup id | sort -_time | head 1 | eval distance_km=round(equivalent_walking_distance/1000,2) | table score, steps, active_calories, distance_km, inactivity_alerts","queryParameters":{"earliest":"-2d","latest":"now"}},"name":"Activity — latest"},"ds_spo2":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"index=oura oura_data_type=spo2 | dedup id | spath input=_raw path=\"spo2_percentage.average\" output=spo2_avg | sort -_time | head 1 | eval spo2_avg=round(spo2_avg,1), spo2color=case(spo2_avg>=95,\"#4CAF50\",spo2_avg>=90,\"#F4A422\",true(),\"#E8503A\") | table spo2_avg, spo2color","queryParameters":{"earliest":"-2d","latest":"now"}},"name":"SpO2 — latest"},"ds_resting_hr":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"index=oura oura_data_type=heart_rate | dedup timestamp | sort -_time | head 288 | stats min(bpm) as resting_hr | table resting_hr","queryParameters":{"earliest":"-2d","latest":"now"}},"name":"Resting HR — latest"},"ds_contributors":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"index=oura oura_data_type=readiness | dedup id | spath input=_raw path=\"contributors.activity_balance\" output=v_a | spath input=_raw path=\"contributors.body_temperature\" output=v_b | spath input=_raw path=\"contributors.hrv_balance\" output=v_c | spath input=_raw path=\"contributors.previous_day_activity\" output=v_d | spath input=_raw path=\"contributors.previous_night\" output=v_e | spath input=_raw path=\"contributors.recovery_index\" output=v_f | spath input=_raw path=\"contributors.resting_heart_rate\" output=v_g | spath input=_raw path=\"contributors.sleep_balance\" output=v_h | spath input=_raw path=\"contributors.sleep_regularity\" output=v_i | sort -_time | head 1 | eval \"Activity Balance\"=round(v_a,0), \"Body Temp\"=round(v_b,0), \"HRV Balance\"=round(v_c,0), \"Previous Day\"=round(v_d,0), \"Previous Night\"=round(v_e,0), \"Recovery Index\"=round(v_f,0), \"Resting HR\"=round(v_g,0), \"Sleep Balance\"=round(v_h,0), \"Sleep Regularity\"=round(v_i,0) | table \"Activity Balance\",\"Body Temp\",\"HRV Balance\",\"Previous Day\",\"Previous Night\",\"Recovery Index\",\"Resting HR\",\"Sleep Balance\",\"Sleep Regularity\" | transpose | rename column as contributor, \"row 1\" as score | sort -score","queryParameters":{"earliest":"-2d","latest":"now"}},"name":"Readiness contributors"},"ds_score_trend":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"index=oura oura_data_type IN (sleep, readiness, activity) oura_data_type | dedup id | spath input=_raw path=\"readiness.score\" output=nested_score | eval date=strftime(_time,\"%Y-%m-%d\"), adj_score=coalesce(nested_score, score) | stats avg(adj_score) as score by oura_data_type, date | xyseries date, oura_data_type, score | rename activity as Activity, readiness as Readiness, sleep as Sleep | sort date","queryParameters":{"earliest":"$global_time.earliest$","latest":"$global_time.latest$"}},"name":"Score trends (sleep/readiness/activity)"},"ds_sleep_detail":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"index=oura oura_data_type=sleep_detail | dedup day sortby -total_sleep_duration | sort -_time | head 1 | eval sleep_hours=round(total_sleep_duration/3600,1) | table sleep_hours","queryParameters":{"earliest":"-2d","latest":"now"}},"name":"Sleep duration — latest"}},"visualizations":{"readiness_sv":{"type":"splunk.singlevalue","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_readiness"},"options":{"majorField":"score","majorColor":"> majorValue | rangeValue(colorRange)","context":{"colorRange":[{"from":0,"to":60,"value":"#E8503A"},{"from":60,"to":75,"value":"#F4A422"},{"from":75,"to":100,"value":"#4CAF50"}]},"majorFontSize":72,"label":"Readiness","showLabel":false,"labelFontSize":13,"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.5)","trendDisplay":"off","sparklineDisplay":"off","majorValue":"> sparklineValues | lastPoint()","trendValue":"> sparklineValues | delta(-2)","sparklineValues":"> primary | seriesByName('score')","align":"left"},"title":"Readiness Score"},"sleep_sv":{"type":"splunk.singlevalue","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_sleep"},"options":{"majorField":"score","majorColor":"> majorValue | rangeValue(colorRange)","context":{"colorRange":[{"from":0,"to":60,"value":"#E8503A"},{"from":60,"to":75,"value":"#F4A422"},{"from":75,"to":100,"value":"#4263B8"}]},"majorFontSize":72,"label":"Sleep","showLabel":false,"labelFontSize":13,"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.5)","trendDisplay":"off","sparklineDisplay":"off","majorValue":"> sparklineValues | lastPoint()","trendValue":"> sparklineValues | delta(-2)","sparklineValues":"> primary | seriesByName('score')","align":"left"},"title":"Sleep Score"},"activity_sv":{"type":"splunk.singlevalue","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_activity"},"options":{"majorField":"score","majorColor":"> majorValue | rangeValue(colorRange)","context":{"colorRange":[{"from":0,"to":60,"value":"#E8503A"},{"from":60,"to":75,"value":"#F4A422"},{"from":75,"to":100,"value":"#4CAF50"}]},"majorFontSize":72,"label":"Activity","showLabel":false,"labelFontSize":13,"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.5)","trendDisplay":"off","sparklineDisplay":"off","majorValue":"> sparklineValues | lastPoint()","trendValue":"> sparklineValues | delta(-2)","sparklineValues":"> primary | seriesByName('score')","align":"left"},"title":"Activity Score"},"hrv_sv":{"type":"splunk.singlevalue","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_readiness"},"options":{"majorField":"hrv_bal","majorColor":"#A78BFA","majorFontSize":42,"label":"HRV Balance","showLabel":false,"labelFontSize":13,"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.5)","trendDisplay":"off","sparklineDisplay":"off","majorValue":"> sparklineValues | lastPoint()","trendValue":"> sparklineValues | delta(-2)","sparklineValues":"> primary | seriesByName('hrv_bal')","align":"left"},"title":"HRV Balance"},"rhr_sv":{"type":"splunk.singlevalue","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_resting_hr"},"options":{"majorField":"resting_hr","majorColor":"#4CAF50","majorFontSize":42,"label":"Resting HR","showLabel":false,"labelFontSize":13,"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.5)","trendDisplay":"off","sparklineDisplay":"off","unit":" bpm","unitPosition":"after","majorValue":"> sparklineValues | lastPoint()","trendValue":"> sparklineValues | delta(-2)","sparklineValues":"> primary | seriesByName('resting_hr')","align":"left"},"title":"Resting Heart Rate"},"temp_sv":{"type":"splunk.singlevalue","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_readiness"},"options":{"majorField":"temp_dev","majorColor":"> primary | seriesByName('tempcolor') | lastPoint()","majorFontSize":42,"label":"Temp Deviation","showLabel":false,"labelFontSize":13,"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.5)","trendDisplay":"off","sparklineDisplay":"off","unit":" C","unitPosition":"after","majorValue":"> sparklineValues | lastPoint()","trendValue":"> sparklineValues | delta(-2)","sparklineValues":"> primary | seriesByName('temp_dev')","align":"left"},"title":"Skin Temp Deviation"},"spo2_sv":{"type":"splunk.singlevalue","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_spo2"},"options":{"majorField":"spo2_avg","majorColor":"> primary | seriesByName('spo2color') | lastPoint()","majorFontSize":42,"label":"SpO2","showLabel":false,"labelFontSize":13,"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.5)","trendDisplay":"off","sparklineDisplay":"off","unit":"%","unitPosition":"after","majorValue":"> sparklineValues | lastPoint()","trendValue":"> sparklineValues | delta(-2)","sparklineValues":"> primary | seriesByName('spo2_avg')","align":"left"},"title":"Blood Oxygen"},"sleep_dur_sv":{"type":"splunk.singlevalue","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_sleep_detail"},"options":{"majorField":"sleep_hours","majorColor":"#FFFFFF","majorFontSize":42,"label":"Total Sleep","showLabel":false,"labelFontSize":13,"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.5)","trendDisplay":"off","sparklineDisplay":"off","unit":" hr","unitPosition":"after","majorValue":"> sparklineValues | lastPoint()","trendValue":"> sparklineValues | delta(-2)","sparklineValues":"> primary | seriesByName('sleep_hours')","align":"left"},"title":"Total Sleep"},"steps_sv":{"type":"splunk.singlevalue","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_activity"},"options":{"majorField":"steps","majorColor":"#F4A422","majorFontSize":42,"label":"Steps","showLabel":false,"labelFontSize":13,"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.5)","trendDisplay":"off","sparklineDisplay":"off","majorValue":"> sparklineValues | lastPoint()","trendValue":"> sparklineValues | delta(-2)","sparklineValues":"> primary | seriesByName('steps')","align":"left"},"title":"Steps Today"},"cal_sv":{"type":"splunk.singlevalue","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_activity"},"options":{"majorField":"active_calories","majorColor":"#F4A422","majorFontSize":42,"label":"Active Cal","showLabel":false,"labelFontSize":13,"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.5)","trendDisplay":"off","sparklineDisplay":"off","unit":" kcal","unitPosition":"after","majorValue":"> sparklineValues | lastPoint()","trendValue":"> sparklineValues | delta(-2)","sparklineValues":"> primary | seriesByName('active_calories')","align":"left"},"title":"Active Calories"},"contributors_bar":{"type":"splunk.bar","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_contributors"},"options":{"xAxisField":"contributor","seriesColors":["#8B7FB0"],"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.5)","showRoundedBars":true,"legendDisplay":"off","showDataLabels":"all","yAxisMin":0,"yAxisMax":100},"title":"Readiness Contributors"},"score_trend":{"type":"splunk.line","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_score_trend"},"options":{"xAxisField":"date","seriesColors":["#4CAF50","#4263B8","#F4A422"],"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.5)","legendDisplay":"bottom","showDots":true,"lineWidth":2,"yAxisMin":0,"yAxisMax":100,"yAxisTitle":"Score"},"title":"Score Trends"}},"layout":{"options":{},"globalInputs":["input_global_trp"],"tabs":{"items":[{"layoutId":"layout_1","label":"New tab"}]},"layoutDefinitions":{"layout_1":{"type":"absolute","structure":[{"item":"readiness_sv","type":"block","position":{"x":20,"y":20,"w":290,"h":200}},{"item":"sleep_sv","type":"block","position":{"x":330,"y":20,"w":290,"h":200}},{"item":"activity_sv","type":"block","position":{"x":640,"y":20,"w":290,"h":200}},{"item":"hrv_sv","type":"block","position":{"x":20,"y":240,"w":215,"h":130}},{"item":"rhr_sv","type":"block","position":{"x":255,"y":240,"w":215,"h":130}},{"item":"temp_sv","type":"block","position":{"x":490,"y":240,"w":215,"h":130}},{"item":"spo2_sv","type":"block","position":{"x":725,"y":240,"w":215,"h":130}},{"item":"sleep_dur_sv","type":"block","position":{"x":20,"y":390,"w":290,"h":120}},{"item":"steps_sv","type":"block","position":{"x":330,"y":390,"w":290,"h":120}},{"item":"cal_sv","type":"block","position":{"x":640,"y":390,"w":290,"h":120}},{"item":"contributors_bar","type":"block","position":{"x":950,"y":20,"w":470,"h":490}},{"item":"score_trend","type":"block","position":{"x":20,"y":530,"w":1400,"h":390}}],"options":{"width":1440,"height":950,"display":"auto","backgroundImage":{"x":0,"y":0,"src":"/static/app/oura_health/bg_health.svg","sizeType":"cover"}}}}}}
